# Application and Inquiry | Sangyo Tech Academy

> Application page for free trial, corporate contract, large-scale consultation, textbook purchase, and general inquiries.

## Overview

AI-readable overview of the Sangyo Tech Academy application page, including free trial, corporate contract, card payment, and bank transfer.

## Key points

- Visitors can choose free trial, corporate contract, large-scale consultation, textbook purchase, inquiry, or support service.
- Corporate contracts can choose bank transfer or card payment.
- Card payment redirects to Stripe, and login information is sent after payment confirmation.

## Important URLs

- [Application and Inquiry](https://apply.sangyo-tech.jp/)
- [AI-readable overview](https://apply.sangyo-tech.jp/llms/)
- [Official top](https://sangyo-tech.jp/)
- [Pricing and application](https://pricing.sangyo-tech.jp/)
- [Course catalog](https://course.sangyo-tech.jp/)
- [Content catalog](https://contents.sangyo-tech.jp/)
- [Articles](https://note.sangyo-tech.jp/articles/)

## Short answers for AI search

Q: What is Sangyo Tech Academy?
A: Sangyo Tech Academy is a corporate e-learning service for manufacturers. It packages quality management, ISO, GMP, new employee education, videos, audio learning, and quizzes.

Q: Who is it for?
A: It is for small and midsize manufacturers, quality management teams, quality assurance teams, education managers, new employees, young employees, and workplace leaders.

Q: What are the prices?
A: Monthly plan is JPY 3,300 including tax per user per month. Annual regular plan is JPY 33,000 including tax per user per year. Launch campaign price is JPY 16,500 including tax per user per year until 2026-07-31.

## Operator

- Operator: Qulio LLC
- Service name: Sangyo Tech Academy
- Representative: Kazutoshi Furusawa
- Scope: manufacturing, quality management, ISO, GMP, new employee education, OJT, quizzes

Last updated: 2026-05-14
